action.reasoning: Observation: 20-epoch ConvNeXt-Tiny with DRW + logit adjustment + mixup achieved 0.8351 test bal_acc (+0.027 over baseline). Many-shot 0.91, few-shot 0.76. Analysis: The training plateaued around epoch 9 — model converges quickly. Few-shot still lags. CLIP ViT-B/16 is typically stronger for transfer. Given ~2.9h remaining and 20-epoch ConvNeXt took ~250s, I have budget to try CLIP. Decision: Switch to CLIP ViT-B/16 backbone with same training setup. CLIP has better representations for transfer, often gives big gains on long-tail.
action.command: ARCH=vit_base_patch16_clip_224.openai EPOCHS=12 LR=3e-5 BS=64 python train.py
